summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Islamic Dua Cards app completed successfully. All 8 dua cards accessible via carousel navigation, copy functionality working, proper RTL Arabic text display confirmed.
passed_tests: App loads correctly with header 'Сборник Дуа'
8 dua cards present and accessible in carousel
Arabic text displays properly with RTL direction
Copy buttons work for Arabic, transliteration, and translation sections
Carousel navigation: next/prev buttons function correctly
Card counter displays correct '1 из 8' format and updates properly
Toast notifications appear when copying text
All 8 cards accessible via carousel navigation (100% success rate)
Proper Islamic theme with emerald and gold colors implemented
